Custom Accountability. So let's dive right into it. How are we going to do this? We're going to start off by weekly trackers which we'll be going over. Number two, the Members Portal. So we have a Members Portal just for accountability that you can customize. Number three, Text Campaigns. So we'll go over the manual texting whether you use like a cell phone or a boxer and then go over an automated campaign for the six weeks as well using Scipio. And then number four, Accountability Tips. So let's jump into the first one which is Weekly Trackers. So this is the Weekly Tracker. We went over it briefly in the Blueprint overview but this is something that you would print off and give to your clients or send them the link to so they can print them off but either way they need to fill them out by hand and then they'll take a picture of it and send you the picture every Monday. Okay? That way they complete the week and then you can review how well they did for that week. So the preset accountability areas that we're looking at, our eight hours of sleep at night, tracked and ate all portions, no cheat meals or bad snacks, no alcohol, did they work out, sent you their weekly wands, this is especially important for online clients, in-gym clients could be filling out the clipboard system or drank 80 to 100 ounces of water. So they'll put an X in every one that they did for that day. So on Sunday they should be going all the way across, Monday they go all the way across, Tuesday the only where they won't have X's is they won't have an X every single day for working out. They shouldn't be working out seven days a week without any breaks and then also based on the blueprint when they work out they'll put like an eight out of 10 or seven out of 10 how difficult the workout was for them. Right? So there is there is one of these for every single week of the challenge, so six weeks and this is really important because if they're filling these out every single week that's a high level of accountability and they're really making sure a lot of stuff gets done. So the next thing that we're going to take a look at is the funnel. Oh and by the way the buttons for everything that we're covering the buttons are going to be right below this video. Next we have the funnel. This is much like the custom fitness funnel only this one is going to be just for accountability. So again if you want to know how to change the funnels, how to make them your own that is all in the tech course. But you will be giving them after you import this funnel by clicking on the button you're giving them this link right here and that gives them access to your funnel. Okay so let's take a look at it and see what it looks like. It is very simple it just has week one through six and it has accountability. These videos you're going to want to switch out with your own if you're using this funnel. Okay so Alex talks about a different accountability measure each day of the week. So week one is a weigh-in, week two is weighing your food, week three this is this is meant as a framework for you to be able to create your own accountability and then give it to your clients. So you would use this let's say you wanted to use your own nutrition, your own fitness and your own accountability but you wanted separate portals for them that's why you would use this. If you want it all together in pre-done the 42-day detox already has that and the six-week challenge already has a pre-done templated fitness nutrition and accountability for customized that's why we broke it off and made it separate for you. Okay that way you can use some of it or all of it. Right so you would want to switch these out with your videos that you want your clients to see. Okay so switch it out and then change the typing and add links that you would like but otherwise this is completely framed out and ready for you to make it your own. The next thing that we are going to go over is the campaign. So this is the texting campaign that you are going to want to use through your six-week challenge. Okay so basically you can send this right from your cell phone or a burner phone you can use an app like Voxer and you can send this all over Voxer if you want to use Voxer for accountability or you can send it automated using Scipio which we'll cover after we go over the actual text. So let's say we're sending these out just from our cell phone texting our challengers ourselves. As soon as the challenge starts right so this would be right after WAN day like WAN day has finished everyone's gone you would send them this first text message and it says hey first name I'm excited to get this challenge started with you remember if you need anything and all over the next six weeks that's what I'm here for. Okay to make this a little easier I need to here's the link to the challenge support videos right and then it says portal link here that's where you are going to put in your customized members portal. Okay so again you can find that in the playbook under six week challenge 42 day whichever one you're running that custom portal will be in the playbook and how to how to modify it to make it your own will be there as well and you'll just paste that link here. Then you'll wait three days after you send that first one and it'll say first workout. Hey again how will your first workout go? Enjoying it so far? Anything I can help with? Please feel free to let me know if there's anything I can do that's why I'm here. Now if you want to make this all custom you can you just change you just change what it says make it your own personality but each week after they finish a week they're going to get a new text message so wait four days after you sent that one and week one finished wait seven days after you've sent the third one and it's week two finished week three finished week four finished week five finished and or yelp for a successful challenge completion can't wait to see your results right and then also it prompts them to schedule their halfway meetings and their way outs if they have not done that
